ddls:
CREATE TABLE "timing_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing function */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the timing function */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum timing value */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum timing value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the timing value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing function */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the timing function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timing function was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timing function was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the timing function (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role specification */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timing function */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Master, Slave) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_roles_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES timing_functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing constraint */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timing function */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of constraint (e.g., Setup, Hold) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the constraint */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the constraint value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constraint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constraint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_constraints_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES timing_functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing sample */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timing function */,
  "sample_value" TEXT /* Recorded timing value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sample collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device from which the sample was collected */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Test environment in which the sample was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_samples_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES timing_functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_samples_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization (e.g., engineer, tester, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
